characters.name: The Scavenger
characters.description: Born to find things others miss.

characters.name: The Engineer
characters.description: If it's broken, she can fix it. If it's not, she can make it better.

characters.name: The Soldier
characters.description: Point and shoot. That's all he knows, and it's enough.

characters.name: The Medic
characters.description: Keeping people alive is harder than killing them.
